description.zh-Hans: 对输入图像应用微妙的受控扰动，在保持整体结构的同时产生视觉变体。适用于从单个基础素材生成多个相似资源（例如从同一源生成不同外观的树木、岩石或建筑）。
description.en: Applies subtle controlled perturbation to an input image to produce visual variations while preserving the overall structure. Useful for generating multiple similar assets from a single base (e.g., different looking trees, rocks, or buildings from one source).

triggers.zh-Hans: 变体, 图像变体, 扰动, 风格混合, 参数噪声, 种子随机
triggers.en: variation, image variation, perturbation, style blend, seed scramble

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 对树木素材施加细微扰动，生成外观不同的多个变体。
exampleUsage.en: Apply subtle perturbation to a tree asset to generate multiple visually distinct variations.
